title: Mob List
description: A Fabric mod that displays a list of nearby mobs and their quantities
body:
Hey! This didn't exist and I wanted it so I made it.

### Mob List is a Fabric mod for Minecraft Java Edition that displays a list of mobs within render distance (up to 128 blocks), as well as how many of them exist. This should help with mob farms, which is the reason why I created it, though I'm sure it can be used for other things as well! By default, the config can be pulled up with the F9 key. Mob List is compatible with resourcepacks that replace Minecraft's in-game text, and the font will be reflected on the Mob List text. 

Speaking of font resourcepacks, check out my HD Minecraft font, it goes super well with Mob List.

The HD font can be found here: [FullHD Font Unofficial](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/fullhd-font-unofficial)

Mob List is client-side only, so it works with any singleplayer world or multiplayer server.

I am unsure about compatibility with mods that add new mobs, this is untested.

### FEATURES:

*   Scale Slider
*   Seperate between baby and adult mobs
*   Draggable Mob List display
*   Anchor Mob List to any corner or the center of your Minecraft window
*   Configurable hotkey

![](https://i.imgur.com/boL0u6Z.png)![](https://i.imgur.com/3VpZqs0.png)![](https://i.imgur.com/AZUFUK8.png)![](https://i.imgur.com/1tnu2nx.png)

 

If you encounter any bugs, want to suggest a feature, or follow my other projects please join the Pep Games discord here: [![](https://i.imgur.com/Hp5n9Ii.png)](https://discord.com/invite/Wm4pVUAz9h)
